title: Appendix #A-16 ORS AFT Notice of Change Report Fields
body_text:
Appendix #A-16	ORS AFT Notice of Change Report Fields
Column Name
Column Description
Format
N
AFT Notice of Change status of item
P ГўВЂВ“ Pending
C ГўВЂВ“ Complete
Type
Type of AFT
Debit or Credit
Date
Date item is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Mmm dd yyyy, Example: Jan 05 2005
Transit
Route and Transit Number
Example: 12340809
Account
Account number
1ГўВЂВ“14 digits
Amount
Dollar amount of item
1ГўВЂВ“8 digit dollar amount + ГўВЂВњ.ГўВЂВќ + 2 digit cents
Reference #
Return Reference #
1ГўВЂВ“9 digits
NOC Tran
Notice of change transit #
1-8 digits
NOC Acct
Notice of change account #
1-14 digits
User ID
Name of user that created item
1ГўВЂВ“8 characters
O/U
Online or Upload
O ГўВЂВ“ Indicates item was created online via ORS
U ГўВЂВ“ Indicates item was uploaded to ORS via RTN file
